sourceMovie.title: Tom & Jerry
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Tom & Jerry works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and family blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Ralph Breaks the Internet
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Tom & Jerry clicked for you, Ralph Breaks the Internet (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and family, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Despicable Me 4
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Tom & Jerry clicked for you, Despicable Me 4 (2024) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and family, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Tom & Jerry?
faq.answer: Try Ralph Breaks the Internet, Despicable Me 4, Spies in Disguise—each shares DNA with Tom & Jerry while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Tom & Jerry?
faq.answer: Tom & Jerry (2021) is best described as Comedy, Family, Animation. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Tom & Jerry worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
